symbols.name: DateTimeRangeOperations
symbols.summary: Provides relational and set operations for date and time ranges.

syntax.content: public static class DateTimeRangeOperations

symbols.name: IsBefore(DateTimeRange, DateTimeRange)
symbols.summary: Determines whether the first range ends before or exactly at the second range start.

syntax.content: public static bool IsBefore(this DateTimeRange source, DateTimeRange other)

returns.description: true when the first range is before the second range.
true when the first range is before the second range.

symbols.name: IsAfter(DateTimeRange, DateTimeRange)
symbols.summary: Determines whether the first range starts after or exactly at the second range end.

syntax.content: public static bool IsAfter(this DateTimeRange source, DateTimeRange other)

returns.description: true when the first range is after the second range.
true when the first range is after the second range.

symbols.name: Touches(DateTimeRange, DateTimeRange)
symbols.summary: Determines whether two ranges touch at a boundary without overlapping.

syntax.content: public static bool Touches(this DateTimeRange source, DateTimeRange other)

returns.description: true when the ranges are adjacent.
true when the ranges are adjacent.

symbols.name: IsAdjacentTo(DateTimeRange, DateTimeRange)
symbols.summary: Determines whether two ranges are adjacent.

syntax.content: public static bool IsAdjacentTo(this DateTimeRange source, DateTimeRange other)

returns.description: true when the ranges touch but do not overlap.
true when the ranges touch but do not overlap.

symbols.name: StartsBefore(DateTimeRange, DateTimeRange)
symbols.summary: Determines whether the source range starts before another range.

syntax.content: public static bool StartsBefore(this DateTimeRange source, DateTimeRange other)

returns.description: true when the source starts before the other range.
true when the source starts before the other range.

symbols.name: EndsAfter(DateTimeRange, DateTimeRange)
symbols.summary: Determines whether the source range ends after another range.

syntax.content: public static bool EndsAfter(this DateTimeRange source, DateTimeRange other)

returns.description: true when the source ends after the other range.
true when the source ends after the other range.

symbols.name: Contains(DateTimeRange, DateTimeRange)
symbols.summary: Determines whether the source range fully contains another range.

syntax.content: public static bool Contains(this DateTimeRange source, DateTimeRange other)

returns.description: true when the source contains the other range.
true when the source contains the other range.

symbols.name: Intersection(DateTimeRange, DateTimeRange)
symbols.summary: Returns the half-open intersection of two ranges.

syntax.content: public static DateTimeRange? Intersection(this DateTimeRange source, DateTimeRange other)

returns.description: The intersection, or null when the ranges do not overlap.
The intersection, or null when the ranges do not overlap.

symbols.name: TryIntersection(DateTimeRange, DateTimeRange, out DateTimeRange)
symbols.summary: Attempts to return the half-open intersection of two ranges.

syntax.content: public static bool TryIntersection(this DateTimeRange source, DateTimeRange other, out DateTimeRange result)

returns.description: true when an intersection exists.
true when an intersection exists.

symbols.name: Union(DateTimeRange, DateTimeRange)
symbols.summary: Returns the union of two overlapping or adjacent ranges.

syntax.content: public static DateTimeRange? Union(this DateTimeRange source, DateTimeRange other)

returns.description: The union, or null when the ranges are disjoint.
The union, or null when the ranges are disjoint.

symbols.name: TryMerge(DateTimeRange, DateTimeRange, out DateTimeRange)
symbols.summary: Attempts to merge two overlapping or adjacent ranges.

syntax.content: public static bool TryMerge(this DateTimeRange source, DateTimeRange other, out DateTimeRange result)

parameters.description: The merged range when merge succeeds.

returns.description: true when the ranges overlap or touch.

parameters.description: The merged range when merge succeeds.

returns.description: true when the ranges overlap or touch.

symbols.name: Gap(DateTimeRange, DateTimeRange)
symbols.summary: Returns the finite gap between two disjoint ranges.

syntax.content: public static DateTimeRange? Gap(this DateTimeRange source, DateTimeRange other)

returns.description: The gap, or null when ranges overlap, touch, or have no finite gap.
The gap, or null when ranges overlap, touch, or have no finite gap.

symbols.summary: Sorts and merges overlapping or adjacent ranges.

syntax.content: public static IReadOnlyList Normalize(this IEnumerable source)
